MV APJ PRITI 2
-- OPENING YANGJIANG,CHINA/  27-28 NOV
-- MAINLY KEEN FOR GRAINS CARGO/BIZ
--BOD : HFO  ABT 1800 – ABT  1850 MT AND LSMGO ABT 175  – ABT 225  MT
-- CAN TRY SP AS WELL.
MV STAR DANAI (TO BE RENAMED AS MV APJ PRITI 2)
BUILT 2006, SHIPYARD ; TSUNEISHI SHIPBUILDING CO, LTD. JAPAN
PROPOSED INDIAN-FLAG, CLASS- BV
HO/HA 7/7, DWT 82574 MT AT 14.429 MTRS,TPC 70.209 (S),
LOA/BEAM 228.99 M/32.26 M,GT/NT 43168  / 27291
GRAIN  97186.10 CBM,
GEARLESS, OPEN LOOP SCRUBBER FITTED
SPEED ABT  12.50  KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO  24.50   MT + ABT LSMGO 0.20  MT FOR  BALLAST
SPEED ABT  11.50  KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO 24.00    MT + ABT LSMGO  0.20   MT FOR   LADEN
ECO SPEED ABT  11.50    KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO 23.50  MT + ABT LSMGO  0.20  MT FOR  BALLAST
ECO SPEED ABT  11.00   KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO  23.00  MT + ABT LSMGO 0.20  MT FOR  LADEN
PORT CONSUMPTION PER DAY ( WHEN SCRUBBER USED )
IDLE : HFO
–
ABT 2.70   MT ( GENERATOR)  + ABT LSMGO  1.00 MT  FOR BOILER
WORKING : HFO - ABT 4.00 MT ( GENERATORs) + ABT LSMGO 1.00  MT, FOR BOILER
(BALLAST OPERATION/MOORING OPERATION )
PORT CONSUMPTION PER DAY ( WHEN SCRUBBER  NOT USED )
IDLE : LSMGO
–
ABT 2.70  MT ( GENERATOR)  + ABT LSMGO 1.00 MT  FOR BOILER
WORKING : LSMGO - ABT 3.50 MT ( GENERATORS) + ABT LSMGO  1.00  MT, FOR BOILER
(BALLAST OPERATION /MOORING OPERATION )
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
ALL SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE AVERAGE FIGURES DURING C/P PERIOD. ALL SPEED AND ALL CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS \'ABOUT\'.
HFO 380 CST CLASS RMG 380 MAX SULPHUR CONTENT 3.50 % / DIESEL CLASS DMA MAX SULPHUR CONTENT 0.10 % , BOTH GRADES AS PER ISO 8217: 2017 OR LATEST EDITION. NO USED LUBRICANTS TO BE PRESENT IN FUEL NO COMINGLING OF DIFFERENT FUEL BATCHES IN TANKS ALLOWED "VESSEL USE HFO /LSLSMGO AS PER DESCRIPTION. HFO/LSLSMGO IS USED FOR STARTING/STOPPING OF AUX-ENGINES AND AUX-BOILERS. MAIN ENGINE IS CHANGED TO LSLSMGO WHEN MAINTENANCE IS REQUIRED TO BE DONE ON FUEL SYSTEM ON RARE OCCASIONS M/E IS CHANGED TO LSLSMGO WHILE MANOEUVRING IN NARROW WATERS.
AT SEA PERFORMANCE FIGURES,ONLY APPLY ON GOOD WEATHER DAYS OF A MINIMUM 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS FROM NOON TO NOON. AND ANY OF THE FOLLOWING DAYS ARE EXCLUDED FROM ANY WARRANTY AS TO THE VESSELS SPEED AND PERFORMANCE:
THOSE IN WHICH WEATHER CONDITION EXCEEDS EITHER IN  SEABUOY TO SEABUOY IN MODERATE WEATHER UPTO/INCLUDING BEAUFORT 4.DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 AND SIGNIFICANT WAVE AND SWELL HEIGHT OF 1.25M OR GREATER OR THOSE IN WHICH THERE ARE NEGATIVE INFLUENCES OF SWELL OR THOSE IN WHICH THERE ARE ADVERSE CURRENTS. NO ADVERSE CURRENT, NO EXTRAPOLATIONS TO BE MADE, FOR THE PURPOSES OF CALCULATING CHARTERERS’ LOSSES RESULTING FROM ANY UNDERPERFORMANCE, OVER ANY PERIODS DURING WHICH THE WEATHER/SEA CONDITIONS ARE OTHER THAN AS THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE, AND POSTIVE CURRENT NOT BE SUBSTRACTED FROM VESSELS SPEED TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT WHEN CALCULATING THE VESSEL\'S PERFORMANCE.
ALL DETAILS “ABOUT” WHICH IS UNDERSTOOD TO MEAN A 0.5 KNOTS TOLERANCE AND A 5% ALLOWANCE ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION, BOTH IN VESSEL\'S FAVOR. IN THE EVENT THAT ANY SPEED/PERFORMANCE CLAIM IS MADE, OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO OFFSET THE VALUE OF ANY BUNKER SAVINGS MADE BY CHARTERERS BELOW THE UPPER LIMIT OF THE WARRANTED CONSUMPTION. POSITIVE CURRENTS NOT TO BE CONSIDERED FOR ANALYSING PERFORMANCE.
THE PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND AGREE THAT WHEN NAVIGATING ANY ECA (EMMISION CONTROL AREA), THE VESSEL IS OBLIGED TO CONSUME LSLSMGO IN LIEU OF HFO AND AS SUCH, THE VESSELS PERFORMANCE SHALL BE AFFECTED. AS A RESULT, NONE OF THE PERFORMANCE WARRANTIES IN THIS C/P RELATING TO THE VESSELS SPEED AND/OR CONSUMPTION SHALL BE APPLICABLE TO PERIODS IN WHICH THE VESSEL IS NAVIGATING ANY ECA; AND ANY PERIOD NAVIGATING ANY ECA SHALL BE EXCLUDED FROM ANY SPEED OR PERFORMANCE CALCULATION.
ADA, WOG
